headline: Aeropay To Leverage Jack Henry (JKHY)’s Embedded Payments Technology To Expand Its Instant Payment Capabilities
summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY), with a forward P/E of 18.02x and upside potential of 50.70%, is among the top 10 lowest forward P/E stocks in the S&P 500. headline: JKHY (Jack Henry & Associates Inc) Screened as a Quality Dividend Stock with Strong Fundamentals and Sustainable Payouts
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) offers a reliable 1.87% dividend with a low 32.68% payout ratio, strong profitability, and a debt-free balance sheet, making it a solid choice for sustainable dividend investing.
